name: Gastrodia
summary: It should be framed conservatively because traditional neurologic use is broader than modern evidence.
description: It should be framed conservatively because traditional neurologic use is broader than modern evidence.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
interactions: May add to CNS depressant or antihypertensive effects

sources.title: Review on pharmacological effects of gastrodin
Gastrodin regulates the TLR4/TRAF6/NF-κB pathway to reduce neuroinflammation and microglial activation in an AD model
